title: Syphilis Laboratory Information | Syphilis | CDC
text:
cular Syphilis, and Otosyphilis — Healthcare providers with patients suspected of ocular syphilis can collect clinical specimens for molecular typing. For assistance with the collection procedure or shipment of samples, please contact Dr. Allan Pillay at 404-639-2140 or stdlaboratoryspecim@cdc.gov .
March 5, 2024
